---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, resource, prompt, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Use case**
How would you use this? What problem does it solve?

**Which area does this affect?**
- [ ] Tools (new tool or changes to an existing tool)
- [ ] Resources (new live data resource)
- [ ] Prompts (new guided workflow)
- [ ] Transport / connectivity
- [ ] Safety / access control
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Any relevant Jellyfin API endpoints, screenshots, or references.
